target.name: UNRESTRICTED_TERMINAL_NORMALIZATION_BASE_SELECTED
target.statement: forall w, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain_defect(w) = 0 -> exists nf : W_T, selected_domain(nf) and terminal_T(nf) and represents_terminal(nf,w) and normalization_relation(w,nf)

weakest_missing_object.name: SELECTED_REPRESENTABLE_HAS_TERMINAL_NORMAL_FORM
weakest_missing_object.statement: forall w, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain_representable(w) -> exists nf : W_T, selected_domain(nf) and terminal_T(nf) and represents_terminal(nf,w) and normalization_relation(w,nf)
weakest_missing_object.role: expands selected_domain_representable into the concrete selected terminal normal form needed for the base case
